title: Crumbly Spicy Date Thai Crumble
description: A delectable date-night Thai dish featuring a blend of spiced dates and crunchy spices for a unique crumbly texture suitable for any craving.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup finely chopped roasted red bell pepper
ingredients.notes: optional, adds nice sweetness without overpowering the spices

ingredients.name: 1/4 teaspoon ground cloves
ingredients.notes: traditional Thai spice, adds complexity to the dish

ingredients.name: 1/8 teaspoon cayenne pepper (adjustable for heat preference)
ingredients.notes: to add some heat and crunch

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup unsweetened coconut milk
ingredients.notes: ensure it is full-fat for better texture

ingredients.name: A few twists of fresh lime juice (optional)

instructions: In a small saucepan, combine dates with ginger, red bell pepper, cumin, smoked paprika, cloves, and cayenne pepper. Mix well until combined.
Add coconut milk and stir until the mixture reaches an emulsion state. Taste for seasoning; add salt if necessary.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish lined with parchment paper or sprayed lightly with cooking spray.
Bake in preheated oven for 20 minutes, stirring once halfway through.
Once done, remove from heat and let it cool down slightly before spreading evenly over a serving plate. Sprinkle lime juice on top if desired to enhance the flavors.
